debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

failed_attempts:
have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at hE
  rw [← norm_sq_eq_zero, ← norm_eq_zero (x := ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t)]
  rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (norm_nonneg _) (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (div_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)))]
  rw [ω_sq] at hE
  field_simp [(m_pos S).ne.symm, ω_neq_zero S] at hE ⊢
  nlinarith

have hE : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖^2 + S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖^2 =
      S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖^2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖^2 := by
    have hE' : S.energy (IC.trajectory S) t = 1/2 * (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) := by
      rw [trajectory_energy]; rfl
    simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE'
    linarith
  have hωsq : S.k = S.m * S.ω^2 := ω_sq S
  have h_pos : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖^2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω)^2 := by positivity
  constructor
  · intro h
    simp [h, hωsq] at hE
    apply (pow_left_inj (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _) two_ne_zero).mp
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt h_pos]
    field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero] at hE ⊢
    nlinarith
  · intro h
    rw [h, Real.sq_sqrt h_pos, hωsq] at hE
    field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    exact norm_eq_zero.mp (sq_eq_zero.mp (by nlinarith))

  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE

have hω := S.ω_neq_zero
  have h0 {x : Space 1} : x = 0 ↔ x 0 = 0 :=
    ⟨fun h => by rw [h]; simp, fun h => by funext i; fin_cases i; exact h⟩
  have h_norm (x : Space 1) : ‖x‖ ^ 2 = (x 0) ^ 2 := by
    have : ‖x‖ = |x 0| := by simp [PiLp.norm_eq_of_L2, Finset.sum_fin_one]
    rw [this, sq_abs]
  have h_pos : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)
  rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt h_pos, h_norm, h_norm, h_norm,
    h0, trajectory_velocity, trajectory_eq]
  simp only [PiLp.add_apply, PiLp.neg_apply, PiLp.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, PiLp.zero_apply]
  set c := cos (S.ω * t)
  set s := sin (S.ω * t)
  set X := IC.x₀ 0
  set V := IC.v₀ 0
  set w := S.ω
  have h_ident : (c * X + s * V / w) ^ 2 - (X ^ 2 + (V / w) ^ 2) = - (s * X - c * V / w) ^ 2 := by
    rw [← one_mul (X ^ 2), ← one_mul ((V / w) ^ 2), ← cos_sq_add_sin_sq (w * t)]; ring
  rw [← sub_eq_zero, h_ident, neg_eq_zero, pow_eq_zero_iff (by norm_num : 0 < 2)]
  field_simp [hω]; ring_nf

    apply (mul_right_inj' (by linarith [S.k_pos] : (1/2 : ℝ) * S.k ≠ 0)).mp

    ring
  · intro h

      apply (mul_right_inj' (by linarith [S.m_pos] : (1/2 : ℝ) * S.m ≠ 0)).mp
      rw [← add_left_inj (1 / 2 * S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)), zero_add, hE]
      field_simp [ω_sq, ω_neq_zero S]

have hE := trajectory_energy S IC t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at hE
  have h_m : S.m ≠ 0 := S.m_pos.ne'
  have h_ω : S.ω ≠ 0 := S.ω_neq_zero
  have h1 : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    apply (mul_right_inj' (mul_ne_zero (by norm_num) h_m)).mp
    simp only [ω_sq] at hE ⊢
    rw [mul_add, mul_add, hE]
    ring
  rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))]
  constructor
  · intro hv

    field_simp [h_ω] at h1 ⊢
    rw [h1]
    ring
  · intro hx'

    rw [mul_add, mul_div_cancel' _ (pow_ne_zero 2 h_ω)] at h1

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  rw [← Real.sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _),
    Real.sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))]
  constructor
  · intro h

  · intro h
    field_simp [h, S.ω_sq, S.m_pos.ne', S.k_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    have h1 : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by nlinarith

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at hE
  have h_pos : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by positivity
  have h_v : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 =
      S.ω ^ 2 * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 - ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2) := by
    apply (mul_right_inj' (show 1 / 2 * S.m ≠ 0 from S.m_pos.ne')).1
    rw [hE]
    field_simp [ω_sq, S.m_pos.ne']

    ← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg h_pos), sq_sqrt h_pos]

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, ω_sq] at hE
  have h_sq_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 :=
    add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (div_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h] at hE

    rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt h_sq_nonneg]
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE ⊢
    linear_combination hE * 2 / (S.m * S.ω ^ 2)

    rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt h_sq_nonneg] at h
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE h ⊢
    linear_combination (hE * 2 / S.m) - h

end HarmonicOscillator
end ClassicalMechanics

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, ω_sq] at hE
  have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
  have hm : S.m / 2 ≠ 0 := by positivity
  have hmk : S.m * S.ω ^ 2 / 2 ≠ 0 := by positivity
  rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero_iff, ← mul_left_inj' hm, mul_zero,
    ← add_right_inj (b := S.m * S.ω ^ 2 / 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2), hE]
  have h1 : (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.m * S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) / 2 =
    S.m * S.ω ^ 2 / 2 * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
    field_simp [hω]; ring
  rw [h1, mul_left_inj' hmk, sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg _), sq_sqrt]
  positivity

have h_id : S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 + ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 =
    S.ω ^ 2 * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
    simp [trajectory_eq, trajectory_velocity, norm_sq_eq_inner, EuclideanSpace.inner_def,
      Fin.sum_univ_one, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, norm_real]
    ring
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 :=
    add_nonneg (pow_two_nonneg _) (pow_two_nonneg _)
  rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← pow_eq_zero_iff (by norm_num : 0 < 2),
    (Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (norm_nonneg _) h_nonneg).symm]
  field_simp [ω_neq_zero S]
  rw [← h_id]
  simp

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, ω_sq] at hE
  have h_pos : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)
  rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg _), sq_sqrt h_pos, ← norm_sq_eq_zero]
  field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero] at hE ⊢
  constructor
  · intro h; rw [h, zero_add] at hE; simpa [(m_pos S).ne.symm] using hE.symm
  · intro h; rw [h] at hE; simpa [(m_pos S).ne.symm] using hE

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, ← mul_add] at hE
  rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero_iff, ← mul_right_inj' S.m_pos.ne',
    ← add_left_inj (a := S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2), zero_add,
    ← mul_left_inj (show (1/2 : ℝ) ≠ 0 by norm_num), hE,
    sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg _), sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
  field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero, S.m_pos.ne', S.k_pos.ne', S.ω_sq]
  ring

have h_cons : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖^2 + S.ω^2 * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖^2 =
      ‖IC.v₀‖^2 + S.ω^2 * ‖IC.x₀‖^2 := by
    have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
    simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
    rw [ω_sq S]
    linarith [S.m_pos]
  rw [← norm_sq_eq_zero, ← sq_inj_iff (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg _),
    sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _))]
  field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero]
  rw [← h_cons]
  simp

have hω := S.ω_neq_zero
  have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  have hk : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by rw [S.ω_sq, mul_comm, div_mul_cancel₀ _ S.m_pos.ne']
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, hk] at hE
  rw [← mul_right_inj' (show (1 / 2 : ℝ) * S.m ≠ 0 from by positivity)] at hE

have hE := trajectory_energy S IC
  simp [funext_iff, energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE

  · field_simp [S.ω_sq, S.ω_neq_zero, S.m_pos.ne', S.k_pos.ne']

  · positivity

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)
  have hC : S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 = S.k * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
    field_simp [ω_sq, S.m_pos.ne.symm, S.k_pos.ne.symm, S.ω_neq_zero]

  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h] at hE
    simp only [norm_zero, sq_zero, mul_zero, zero_add] at hE
    rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg h_nonneg), sq_sqrt h_nonneg, ← hC]
    linarith
  · intro h
    rw [h, sq_sqrt h_nonneg, ← hC] at hE
    have : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by linarith [S.m_pos]

  constructor <;> intro h
  · rw [h, zero_add, mul_comm, ← mul_add] at hE
    field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero] at hE ⊢
    exact hE.symm
  · rw [h, mul_comm, ← mul_add] at hE
    field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    simp [add_comm] at hE
    exact hE

have hE := trajectory_energy S IC t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at hE
  have h_pos : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by positivity
  rw [← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (Real.sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt h_pos, ← norm_eq_zero,
    ← sq_eq_zero, ← mul_left_inj' (by positivity : (1 / 2 * S.m : ℝ) ≠ 0),
    ← add_left_inj (a := 1 / 2 * S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2), hE]
  field_simp [ω_sq S, ω_neq_zero S]
  constructor <;> intro h <;> simp [h] <;> ring

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, ω_sq] at hE
  have h_sq : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = S.ω ^ 2 * (‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 - ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2) := by
    have h_m := (m_pos S).ne'
    have h_ω := S.ω_neq_zero
    field_simp [h_m, h_ω] at hE ⊢
    linear_combination 2 * hE
  rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← pow_eq_zero_iff (n := 2) (by norm_num), h_sq, mul_eq_zero,
    pow_eq_zero_iff (n := 2) (by norm_num), sub_eq_zero]
  simp [S.ω_neq_zero]
  rw [← pow_eq_pow_iff_abs_eq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg _),
    sq_sqrt (add_nonneg (pow_two_nonneg _) (div_nonneg (pow_two_nonneg _) (pow_two_nonneg _))),
    abs_norm, abs_of_nonneg (sqrt_nonneg _)]

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  have hωsq : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by rw [ω_sq]; field_simp [S.m_pos.ne']
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [h, norm_zero, zero_pow (by norm_num), hωsq] at hE
    rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE ⊢
    exact hE
  · intro h
    rw [h, sq_sqrt (by positivity), hωsq, ← norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero_iff] at hE
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    simpa [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] using hE

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  rw [← norm_sq_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg _), Real.sq_sqrt]
  · have h_ω_sq : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by rw [ω_sq S]; field_simp [S.m_pos.ne']
    rw [h_ω_sq] at hE
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', ω_neq_zero S] at hE ⊢
    constructor <;> intro <;> nlinarith
  · exact add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)

have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, ω_sq] at hE
  rw [← norm_eq_zero, ← sq_eq_zero_iff, ← sq_eq_sq (norm_nonneg _) (sqrt_nonneg _),
    sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
  have h_m : S.m ≠ 0 := S.m_pos.ne'
  have h_ω : S.ω ≠ 0 := S.ω_neq_zero
  field_simp [h_m, h_ω] at hE ⊢
  rw [← hE]
  simp
